din913.source: DIN 913 hexagon socket set screw with flat point, M12 x 30 (representative length). socket_af=6.0 and socket_depth=4.5 tabulated (fasteners.eu DIN 913/914/915/916 + ISO 4029 tables, cross-checked against Aspen Fasteners DIN 916); d=12.0 (M12 major). Cylinder drawn as a smooth envelope (no thread). tip_chamfer=1.0 is a representative flat-point edge break (the DIN 913 chamfered edge), not tabulated.

iso4026.source: ISO 4026 hexagon socket set screw with flat point, M12 — same envelope as DIN 913 (socket_af=6.0, socket_depth=4.5), so it aliases the DIN base. Confirmed vs fasteners.eu ISO 4026/4029 tables + Aspen Fasteners DIN 916.

din914.source: DIN 914 hexagon socket set screw with cone point, M12 x 30. socket_af=6.0/socket_depth=4.5 tabulated (fasteners.eu DIN 914/916 + ISO 4029, cross-checked against Aspen Fasteners DIN 916). Cone point is 90 degrees for M12 (tabulated angle, fasteners.eu DIN 914) with tip flat diameter dt=point_d=2.5 (tabulated, fasteners.eu DIN 914 range 2.4-3, cross-checked against a second public reference); point_h=(d-point_d)/2=4.75 is derived (representative) from the tabulated 90-degree cone geometry, not itself tabulated.

iso4027.source: ISO 4027 cone-point socket set screw, M12 — same envelope + cone as DIN 914, aliases the DIN base. Confirmed vs fasteners.eu ISO 4027/4029 tables + Aspen Fasteners DIN 916.

din915.source: DIN 915 hexagon socket set screw with dog point, M12 x 30. socket_af=6.0/socket_depth=4.5 tabulated (fasteners.eu DIN 915/916 + ISO 4029, cross-checked against Aspen Fasteners DIN 916); dog diameter dp=point_d=8.14 and dog length z=point_h=6.0 both tabulated for M12, cross-checked between fasteners.eu DIN 915 and a second public reference (Westfield Fasteners / Perplexity-sourced dog-point table).

iso4028.source: ISO 4028 dog-point socket set screw, M12 — same envelope + dog as DIN 915, aliases the DIN base. Confirmed vs fasteners.eu ISO 4028/4029 tables + Aspen Fasteners DIN 916.

din916.source: DIN 916 hexagon socket set screw with cup point, M12 x 30. socket_af=6.0/socket_depth=4.5 and cup mouth diameter dv=point_d=7.6 (from a 7.64 min / 8 max tabulated range) both tabulated, cross-checked between fasteners.eu DIN 916 and Aspen Fasteners DIN 916 (two dimensioned tables); cup depth point_h=2.0 is representative (not tabulated). d=12.0 (M12 major).

iso4029.source: ISO 4029 cup-point socket set screw, M12 — same envelope + cup as DIN 916, aliases the DIN base. Confirmed vs fasteners.eu ISO 4029 table + Aspen Fasteners DIN 916.
